title: vaccinium borneense
intro: Vaccinium borneense, also known as the Borneo blueberry or mountain blueberry, is a species of shrub in the heath family (Ericaceae) that is native to the island of Borneo in Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vaccinium borneense include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Vaccinium borneense can be prepared as a tea, extract, or supplement, and is also used as a food ingredient in jams and desserts.
